name: Peak Design Travel Wash Pouch 2.5L
description: The coyote Travel Wash Pouch from Peak Design has a 2.5L capacity to keep your toiletries organized on your next trip. It features a zippered, clamshell design for easy access to your soap, shampoo, contact lens case, and more.

features.Key Features:: 5 Stretch Mesh Interior Pockets | Dedicated Toothbrush Pocket | Carry Handles, Zippered Exterior Pocket | Tuck-Away Hook for Hanging | Water-Resistant, Easy-Clean Surface
